---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the bridge, CLI, or benchmark
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

What are you trying to accomplish? Describe the concrete scenario.

## Current Behavior

How does the project handle this today (or fail to)?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to see? Be specific about the change.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is this one better?

## Evaluation Criteria

How would you verify the improvement works? (e.g., benchmark metric, CLI output, compliance check)
